desc: U8 (docs/USABLE_MACHINE_EXPERIMENTS.md): after SMP (005), cpufreq (006), and IRQ-816 console (073) each pass a solo rig boot, build ONE integrated J614s DT carrying all three (14 cores + apple,cluster-cpufreq + IRQ-816 interrupt console) on the proven dcuart base. Host-validate (dtbs_check), pin, cross-review, propose a single integration boot. This is the DT the usable RAM distro ships; the only step that combines boundaries, and only proven ones. Strictly post-B0 and after U1/U2/U3 individually pass. No forbidden writes.
author: claude
